scope: safe audit-first refactor for KISS PM SaaS/self-hosted foundation

notes: phase2-2-users-crud.png is untracked and was not touched.
User-requested legacy English source-of-truth paths are absent; current Russian canonical docs from docs/README.md were used.

blocks.problem: The task referenced old English canonical document paths that no longer exist after docs-first restart.
tests_before: Get-Content docs/README.md and current Russian canonical docs
tests_after: Documented as source-of-truth path drift; no runtime checks required
blocks.notes: Use current Russian canonical docs as source of truth; do not recreate old filenames unless a docs decision asks for compatibility aliases.

blocks.problem: Workspace config constraints are duplicated in API parsers and web form validation instead of living in the domain boundary.
blocks.notes: Completed in this batch. Domain now owns normalized validators and raw-input compatibility helpers; API error codes and Russian UI messages stayed unchanged.

blocks.problem: App.tsx is a god file with routing shell, data orchestration, CRUD views, dialogs and UI state in one 2100+ line component.
tests_before: apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts currently allows App.tsx up to 2200 lines
tests_after: component or route-level characterization tests before extraction
blocks.notes: REF-003 is reopened after review: helper extraction was not enough. Completed sub-slices: REF-003A shell state helpers, REF-003B route icon registry, REF-003C dashboard view extraction, REF-003D users view extraction. Continue with page/view-level boundaries until App.tsx is below 500 lines.

blocks.problem: Dashboard presentation lived inside App.tsx and kept the shell god-file above the current guardrail.
blocks.notes: DashboardView extracted as a presentation component; App.tsx line budget tightened from 2800 to 2600. Next slices should use Next App Router page/view boundaries where possible.

blocks.problem: Users CRUD view, form state, modal state and user mutations lived inside App.tsx.
blocks.notes: UsersView extracted without changing route ids, permissions, mutation calls or modal behavior. App.tsx line budget tightened from 2600 to 2200.

blocks.problem: App.tsx owned pure permission checks, section loading/error state, metric hints and API error message mapping, making shell behavior harder to test outside the god-file.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceShellState.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts failed because workspaceShellState did not exist
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceShellState.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts
blocks.notes: SectionState moved to a neutral shell-state module; workspace-ui imports only its type. API error messages and permission checks are covered by characterization tests.

blocks.problem: App.tsx owned route icon metadata that belongs with shell route metadata rather than the main application component.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceRouteIcons.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts failed because workspaceRouteIcons did not exist
tests_after: pnpm vitest run apps/web/src/workspaceRouteIcons.test.ts apps/web/src/routes.test.ts apps/web/src/repositoryHealth.test.ts
blocks.notes: Route icon registry now has coverage for every stable workspace route id. Test adjusted after verifying lucide icons can be React component objects, not only functions.

blocks.problem: API app file is still large and combines route wiring, auth/session behavior, workspace operations and audit concerns.
blocks.notes: Closed for this refactor plan through REF-004A app error mapping. Further route-group extraction remains a future low-risk sequence.

blocks.problem: app.ts owned fail-closed application error mapping alongside route wiring.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run apps/api/src/appErrors.test.ts apps/api/src/app.test.ts failed because appErrors did not exist
blocks.notes: MissingAccessProfileError and resolveAppErrorResponse now live outside app.ts; Hono onError remains a thin adapter.

blocks.problem: Repository layer is a broad persistence surface; tenant, user, profile, workspace config and audit operations are coupled in one file.
blocks.notes: Closed for this refactor plan through REF-005A repository row mappers. Further repository splitting remains future cleanup after more persistence characterization.

blocks.problem: repositories.ts owned pure row-to-domain mappers and permission coercion alongside SQL query methods.
tests_before: pnpm vitest run packages/persistence/src/repositoryMappers.test.ts packages/persistence/src/repositories.db.test.ts failed because repositoryMappers did not exist
blocks.notes: Pure mappers and toPermission moved to repositoryMappers; repository SQL and public datasource API stayed unchanged.

blocks.problem: Large integration and smoke specs are valuable but hard to localize when failures happen.
blocks.notes: REF-006A extracted Playwright smoke helpers without weakening assertions; remaining future split into multiple specs is optional once flows grow further.

blocks.problem: The smoke spec embedded login/logout and responsive navigation assertions inline, making failures harder to localize.
tests_before: pnpm test:e2e:smoke failed after importing the future helper because smokeHelpers did not exist
blocks.notes: Login/logout/dashboard readiness and responsive navigation assertions now have named helper functions. Assertions were moved, not removed.

blocks.problem: Local generated artifacts and an untracked screenshot are present in the worktree; generated output can obscure refactor diffs.
blocks.notes: No deletion in this refactor closure. The only visible untracked artifact is phase2-2-users-crud.png and it may be user-owned.

blocks.problem: Requested baseline commands npm run lint, npm run test:unit and npm run test:integration are absent.
tests_before: npm run lint exits 1: missing script
npm run test:unit exits 1: missing script
npm run test:integration exits 1: missing script
tests_after: Decision needed before adding new script semantics
blocks.notes: No new script semantics added in this refactor closure. Current canonical checks are pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm test:db, web build and smoke.

blocks.problem: Search did not find Bitrix-specific leakage in active core code, but docs intentionally preserve BR2 as reference/anti-pattern context.
tests_after: Repeat search when adding project-control domain modules
blocks.notes: Keep monitoring as new resource/KPI/control-surface modules appear.
